title: Chapter 55
content:
Chapter 55

Magic was like cooking a five-star dish. Take one step wrong and the entire dish's flavor would change. Sometimes, a hefty pinch of salt instead of just a pinch of salt could ruin the entire dish.

But that was the process of trial and error for you. And frankly, that was all magic was. Trial and error. If something didn't turn out right the first time, one would have to try again, making sure not to repeat the same mistake as last time.

[A healing potion has been created]

[Skill mastery has been increased by 25%]

[Healing potion (E)]

[Effect: Heals 1000 HP]

It was always better to start with the simplest of things. There was no need to delve into the complicated and intricate realms of magic and tackle problems that didn't need to be tackled in the first place.

It was always better to begin from the beginning. For example, there was no need to master the 'Divine Blessing' from the start. Beginning with something as small as 'Heal' that fell into the same category was all right as well.

Baby steps, one could say.

Creation was such a skill. There was no need to go for higher realm things, nor did I need to make complicated things that compelled me to deal with mana very carefully.

Simply creating a healing potion that was an E rank item would suffice. What was a healing potion? The manifestation of mana in the form of a heal with the addition of some water element. It didn't follow the same principles as a heal spell, based on which the shop healing potions were made, but based on pure mana with water element mixed in it.

Just like how I healed the family that one time using pure mana, not converting it into the light or holy element, or how I purified that meat using nothing but pure mana.

Mixing that with water, which had healing qualities of its own, would create a healing potion that I could use and sell. I couldn't create the bottle because that would take too much time. I simply added the potion to the empty bottles of the healing and mana recovery potions I had used before.

No, I did not throw them away.

Anyway, once I had increased the mastery of the skill to E rank, I began to make mana potions instead of healing potions. Unlike traditional mana recovery potions that had herbs and essences mixed into them, I simply made a mana potion that was a pure liquified form of mana.

It was like saving money to use it for later. I was using mana to create mana potions and then consuming those mana potions to create more mana potions. The problem was that at such a low level of the skill, the saved amount in this sense was about thirty percent less than the amount invested.

In other words, I had to use 100 MP to create a mana potion that only restored seventy points of my mana. Still, it was not a complete loss like when the skill was E rank.

[A mana recovery potion has been created]

[Skill mastery has been increased by 15%]

[MP recovery potion (D)]

The problem was that if I were to make E rank items according to the skill's rank, the skill mastery would only increase by 3-5%. However, even if I made higher-ranked items, the skill mastery rate would decrease sharply with each rank.

Like...

[Skill rank has been increased]

[Creation]

[Tier: SSS]

[Mastery(D)]

[A superior mana recovery potion has been created]

[Skill mastery has increased by 5%]

There would come a time when even if I were to make the simplest of SSS rank items, the skill mastery would raise by only one percent every ten or so items.

That was how headache-inducing a skill this was. The only problem was that what I wanted to create was an SSS rank item, so I had to work hard to raise the skill level as well.

The only way to do that was to keep making items on instinct. Perhaps in a month or so, I would be able to raise the skill mastery, but when the skill crosses the A rank in mastery, then it would require focus even from me.

Simply put, the dream of completing my son so that it could stand tall and proud and penetrate every forbidden territory it desired was a bit too far away. My initial calculations were to solve this issue before we left this city, but from the looks of it, I would have to remain in this backwater city for twice that time.

Probably, of course. There was no telling when a lucky opportunity might arise and help me. Though that was very unlikely to happen given my current circumstances.

Even though I didn't have a luck stat, if I did have one, it would be at the rock bottom, or I wouldn't be surprised if it was in negative. That was how shitty lives I had lead in my past ones.

This one was proving to be good, aside from the fact that my dick was now a stub and could only regain life for forty minutes every day.

"Haa..." I sighed and stopped. By the time the skill reached C rank in mastery, it was already half an hour past midnight. My countdown had reset.

It was time to get hard and plow.

~~

In the middle of the night, in the city lord's mansion, Zara made her way to the room she had been in earlier in the day, where she had had a pleasant encounter with the new servant boy her husband was trying to suppress so he wouldn't grow strong and question his authority.

As she arrived in the room, she closed it from behind her and simply sat on the bed. As she closed her eyes, something around her fluttered, and a gust of gentle wind blew throughout the room.

She then opened her eyes and looked at the man in the dark robe who had appeared before her out of nowhere.

"Disciples Zara greets the master." Zara bowed slightly to greet the man in the black robe. The man nodded and asked, "How have you been, child?"

"I have been well, master," Zara replied.

"Hmm... What troubles you, my child?" The man asked.

"I think, master, I have a hunch who was behind our mishap in the sewer," Zara replied.

"Ho? Are you sure?" The hooded man asked.

"I am certain master," Zara replied before she parted her legs and showed him her vagina.

"What am I seeing your filthy place for?" The man wasn't offended in the least and questioned. Her student wasn't the type to mess around, so whatever it was, it must have been for a reason. He gave her the benefit of the doubt to allow her to explain herself.

"A magic like none other, the same kind you had sensed from the sewers." Zara proceeded to part her vagina with her fingers and her pink pussy came into the man's view.

"My instincts tell me it is the same kind of magic that he performed earlier in the day. My circles have increased as well. And all of it was possible due to my vagina and his penis." Zara explained.

"Penis?" The man was confused. How could a penis enter a woman's vagina?

"Are you sure?" The man asked.

"I had to take a mana oath, so I am sure," Zara replied. Although she had taken a mana oath on the spot, a treasure that could nullify that oath just once, a very precious one that she had been saving for times of distress. She had to use it now to relay the news to her master.

Circles could be enhanced in that way. Circles could be enhanced by what the boy had done in the afternoon.

The man was confused and removed his robes, revealing his groin area, and a stub came into view. He looked at Zara and asked, "How will this go inside of you?"

"It is too short for that, master. That boy's was gigantic. I can still feel it in my body." Zara replied.

"Hmm... A deformity, you mean?" The man mused as he dropped the robe, covering his body. He looked at Zara and asked, "Have you found anything else?"

"Nothing as of now, master," Zara replied.

"Hmm..." The man once again mused for a while before he said, "I shall search the royal library for clues of such deformity and also put the whole organization on it. If such a miracle is possible, we must have it."

"Precisely, master." Zara replied before she asked, "May I request something, master?"

"What is it?" The man asked.

"Until you don't find any clues regarding the transformation, may I continue to raise my strength with the help of the boy?" Zara asked.

"I permit you to do so." The man replied.

"Then, my husband could be a hurdle in that task," Zara said.

"You do not have to worry about him. He will soon depart on a hunt." The man replied before he added, "Forever."

"Thank you, master," Zara replied, and the man left, disappearing with another gust of wind as if he had never been there. Left alone, Zara touched her pussy as an electric current passed through her.

"Hmmm~ I can't wait for our next session," Zara said before she put one finger in her tight pussy hole and began to massage her insides, feeling pleasure all on her own.

~~

End of Volume 1

For those asking for there to be a story in porn, it now begins.

Let me know if you find any errors. If you have any questions, let me know as well.

I feel like this would be the perfect time for a break, but I've already used my break when I was in the hospital. So I'm gonna go for two weeks without a break, or at least until the 70th chapter.

Until then, I hope you guys continue to support me, and if you like my work, then be sure to support me on my Patreon page so I can bring you guys more fun arts and stuff.

Yeah, the stuff part was a bit too ambiguous.

Anyway, enjoy and let me know.

See you in Volume 2.
